---
title: "Project Infrastructure"
listing:
  contents:
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  image-placeholder: "assets/research-placeholder-pencil.png"
page-layout: full
---

Documentation and checks for the TimeAnalysis service, runtime, UI, and project architecture.
